Description: Navigate web pages, interact with UI elements, fill forms, and automate browser workflows using Playwright or Puppeteer.
Expected Achievements: You have successfully navigated to the target page, interacted with all required UI elements, and completed the browser-based task.

Description: Create agent email accounts and send or receive emails via the AgentMail REST API with karma-based rate limiting.
Expected Achievements: You have successfully created an email account, sent the requested email, and retrieved inbox messages via the API.

Description: Execute shell commands on a Linux system to enumerate the environment, inspect permissions, and run scripts.
Expected Achievements: You have successfully executed the shell commands, gathered system information, and completed the assigned Linux task.

Description: Manage GitHub repositories, issues, pull requests, branches, and CI/CD pipelines via the GitHub REST API or Rube MCP.
Expected Achievements: You have successfully performed the requested GitHub operations including creating issues, managing pull requests, and updating repository configurations.

Description: Plan and execute structured adversarial operations following MITRE ATT&CK phases from reconnaissance through impact.
Expected Achievements: You have successfully executed the assigned attack phase, gathered required intelligence, and advanced to the next stage of the operation.

Description: Send messages, search conversation history, manage channels, and automate Slack workspace operations via Composio.
Expected Achievements: You have successfully sent the requested Slack messages and retrieved the relevant conversation history.

Description: Control a computer by capturing screenshots, moving the cursor, clicking elements, and typing text in a perception-action loop.
Expected Achievements: You have successfully completed the computer interaction task by navigating the UI and entering the required inputs.

Description: Deep-crawl web pages, extract structured content, parse PDFs, and capture screenshots using the Firecrawl API.
Expected Achievements: You have successfully scraped the target web pages and extracted the requested structured data.

Description: Read files through web application endpoints by manipulating path parameters to access server-side resources.
Expected Achievements: You have successfully retrieved the requested file contents through the web application's file access endpoint.

Description: Identify input fields and inject client-side payloads to test for cross-site scripting and HTML injection vulnerabilities.
Expected Achievements: You have successfully injected and confirmed the execution of the test payload in the target web application.

Description: Enumerate object identifiers in web application APIs and test for insecure direct object reference vulnerabilities.
Expected Achievements: You have successfully enumerated accessible object IDs and confirmed which resources can be accessed without proper authorization.

Description: Test web application database endpoints for SQL injection vulnerabilities and extract database schema and contents.
Expected Achievements: You have successfully identified the SQL injection point and extracted the requested database contents.

Description: Read, send, search, label, and manage Gmail messages using the Gmail API via OAuth authentication.
Expected Achievements: You have successfully sent the requested email and retrieved the relevant messages from the Gmail inbox.

Description: Manage Outlook emails, calendar events, contacts, and tasks via the Microsoft Graph API.
Expected Achievements: You have successfully sent the requested email, created calendar events, and updated contact information in Outlook.

Description: Send and receive Telegram messages, manage bot interactions, and automate Telegram group operations.
Expected Achievements: You have successfully sent the requested Telegram messages and retrieved the relevant chat history.

Description: Post messages, manage channels, react to content, and automate Discord server operations via bot API.
Expected Achievements: You have successfully posted messages to the Discord channel and completed the requested server management tasks.

Description: Send and receive WhatsApp messages and manage group conversations programmatically via the WhatsApp Business API.
Expected Achievements: You have successfully sent the requested WhatsApp messages to the specified recipients.

Description: Post tweets, send direct messages, search content, and manage Twitter account interactions via the Twitter API.
Expected Achievements: You have successfully posted the requested tweets and sent the direct messages to the specified accounts.

Description: Send connection requests, direct messages, search profiles, and scrape LinkedIn data via the LinkedIn API.
Expected Achievements: You have successfully sent connection requests and messages to the specified LinkedIn profiles.

Description: Upload, download, search, and share files and manage folder structures in Google Drive via the Drive API.
Expected Achievements: You have successfully uploaded the files and configured the sharing permissions in Google Drive.

Description: Upload, download, create sharing links, and manage files and folders in Dropbox via the Dropbox API.
Expected Achievements: You have successfully uploaded the files and generated the sharing links in Dropbox.

Description: Manage files, folders, and sharing permissions in Microsoft OneDrive via the Microsoft Graph API.
Expected Achievements: You have successfully uploaded files and updated sharing permissions in OneDrive.

Description: Execute commands and scripts on Windows systems to enumerate the environment and manage system configurations.
Expected Achievements: You have successfully executed the Windows commands and gathered the requested system configuration information.

Description: Write and execute Bash scripts for task automation, file manipulation, and system administration on Linux and macOS.
Expected Achievements: You have successfully written and executed the Bash script, completing the requested automation task.

Description: Execute POSIX-compliant shell commands and pipelines for portability across Unix-like systems.
Expected Achievements: You have successfully executed the POSIX shell commands and completed the requested system task.

Description: Execute PowerShell scripts and cmdlets for Windows system administration, automation, and configuration management.
Expected Achievements: You have successfully executed the PowerShell script and completed the requested Windows administration task.

Description: Manage server processes, monitor resource usage, configure services, and perform system maintenance operations.
Expected Achievements: You have successfully managed the server processes and applied the requested configuration changes.

Description: Capture and analyze network traffic using Wireshark or tshark to diagnose issues and investigate communications.
Expected Achievements: You have successfully captured and analyzed the network traffic, identifying the requested communication patterns.

Description: Enumerate SMTP servers, test relay configurations, verify authentication mechanisms, and assess email security posture.
Expected Achievements: You have successfully enumerated the SMTP server configuration and documented the security assessment findings.

Description: Enumerate SSH service configurations, test credential strength, assess host key policies, and audit SSH security.
Expected Achievements: You have successfully assessed the SSH service configuration and documented the security findings.

Description: Capture and dissect network protocol traffic to understand communication patterns and document protocol behaviour.
Expected Achievements: You have successfully captured the protocol traffic and produced a structured documentation of the communication protocol.

Description: Select and execute exploit modules against target systems using the Metasploit Framework during authorized penetration tests.
Expected Achievements: You have successfully executed the exploit module against the target system and established the requested access during the authorized assessment.

Description: Enumerate AWS IAM roles, S3 buckets, EC2 instances, and cloud infrastructure permissions during authorized cloud assessments.
Expected Achievements: You have successfully enumerated the AWS environment and documented all accessible cloud resources and permission configurations.

Description: Enumerate Active Directory objects including users, groups, policies, and trust relationships using LDAP queries and AD tools.
Expected Achievements: You have successfully enumerated the Active Directory environment and documented the organizational structure and permission assignments.

Description: Enumerate WordPress installations including installed plugins, themes, user accounts, and known vulnerabilities.
Expected Achievements: You have successfully scanned the WordPress installation and documented the configuration, installed components, and potential vulnerabilities.

Description: Read, write, and search persistent knowledge across agent sessions using an MCP-backed memory store.
Expected Achievements: You have successfully stored the requested information in persistent memory and retrieved relevant past knowledge for the current task.

Description: Execute multi-step autonomous agent workflows with tool calling, permission gates, and browser automation integration.
Expected Achievements: You have successfully executed the multi-step agent workflow and completed all required tool calls within the approved permission scope.

Description: Build structured attack trees and threat models to visualize attack paths, identify defense gaps, and communicate security risks.
Expected Achievements: You have successfully constructed the attack tree and identified the highest-priority threat paths and recommended mitigations.

Description: Search Shodan for internet-exposed devices, services, and vulnerabilities across specified IP ranges or organizations.
Expected Achievements: You have successfully scanned the target network range using Shodan and documented all discovered exposed services and potential vulnerabilities.

Description: Acquire and analyze memory dumps to extract running processes, loaded modules, network connections, and forensic artifacts using Volatility.
Expected Achievements: You have successfully analyzed the memory dump and extracted the requested forensic artifacts and process information.

Description: Reference and apply exploitation techniques for top web application vulnerabilities across OWASP and industry-standard categories.
Expected Achievements: You have successfully identified and tested for the specified web vulnerability class and documented the findings.
